question: A team needs to point their Spring Boot starter at a non-production Camunda SaaS environment while keeping their existing `cluster-id`, `region`, and OAuth credentials. Which property in `camunda.client.cloud.*` is intended for this override?

a.text: The properties reference describes `camunda.client.cloud.domain` as "The domain the Camunda client connects to. Change this to connect to a non-production instance of Camunda Cloud." That is exactly the documented use case.

b.text: `cluster-id` identifies a specific cluster; the requirement is to keep the existing cluster-id while moving to non-production.

c.text: `region` identifies the SaaS region; the requirement is to keep the existing region.

d.text: `port` overrides the port the client connects to but is not the documented switch for non-production SaaS endpoints.

explanation: Only `camunda.client.cloud.domain` is documented as the switch for connecting to non-production SaaS instances. Cluster-id and region identify the cluster and region; port is a transport detail.

docs.title: Camunda Spring Boot starter properties reference
